symptom_vector: Database query failures, response time (rrt) spike, increased error rates in dependent services

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: TiDB存储层Region不可用导致数据库查询失败，引发应用服务级联故障
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 通过Metric数据观察到tidb-pd组件的store_unhealth_count从0增加到1，表明存储层节点健康状态异常，Region不可用
Step 2: 分析Log数据发现productcatalogservice出现151次'Error 9005 (HY000): Region is unavailable'错误，frontend服务因数据库查询失败报错，核心错误模式一致
Step 3: 结合Metric数据确认productcatalogservice-2的响应时间rrt从7337.79激增至20171482.25，且tidb-tidb的查询延迟duration_99th从0.01增至64.88，验证存储层故障导致应用性能恶化

critical_checks.instruction: 检查tidb-pd组件的store_unhealth_count指标，确认存储层节点是否不健康

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Contains error and appears frequently in productcatalogservice and frontend logs
critical_checks.instruction: 搜索productcatalogservice和frontend服务的日志，查找'Region is unavailable'错误及其发生频率
监控productcatalogservice的响应时间rrt指标，确认是否有异常延迟激增
